title: Figma learning lab: workflow tips, from slow to flow
speakers: Chad Bergman (Designer Advocate, Figma), Michel Ferreira (Designer Advocate, Figma)
key_points: A pair of Figma Designer Advocates (Chad Bergman and Michel Ferreira) share a collection of practical tips and workflow tricks aimed at helping designers work smarter and faster.
The focus is on speeding up work both on the canvas and beyond it, framing the session around moving from a slow workflow to a state of flow.
The session is positioned as part of Figma's Learning Lab, with an invitation to continue informally afterward in the Learning Lab Lounge for time with the Figma team.
